## Definition of Done

See [`docs/15-definition-of-done.md`](../docs/15-definition-of-done.md) for the PR-tier checklist.

- [ ] Lint clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck clean (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Documentation updated in the same PR (if applicable):
  - [ ] `docs/04` — schema change
  - [ ] `docs/05` — API change
  - [ ] `docs/09` — new risk
  - [ ] `docs/17` — new domain term
  - [ ] `docs/18` + `docs/adr/` — architectural decision
  - [ ] `docs/20` — new analytics event
  - [ ] `docs/21` — new feature flag
- [ ] No `console.log`, `TODO`, or commented-out code left in
- [ ] No `any` without a `// eslint-disable` reason

---

Closes #<issue-number>
